eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Ward, ND; at 12:11 PM on SEP 11, 2019 Effective until 12:26 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required monthly/quarterly test of the Minot operational area emergency alert system.  This is only a test. This ends the test of the Minot operational Area Emergency Alert System. This was only a Test.
